response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software development skills and a diverse technical background, but their experience is heavily skewed toward web and full-stack development (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than the C++-centric, industrial automation focus required for this role. While they have some C/C++ experience, it is not recent or deep enough to confidently meet the core technical competencies.
strengths: Broad technical expertise across multiple languages and domains (web, mobile, desktop, embedded).
Strong background in open-source contributions and event-driven architectures (e.g., GIS platform).
Proven leadership in mentoring, technical documentation, and community engagement (workshops, talks).
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last noted in [year] for NI LabWindows™/CVI).
Lack of demonstrable expertise in industrial automation, cybersecurity (IEC 62443), or cloud platforms (Azure).
Role requires deep specialization in C++/STL, multi-threading, and secure coding, which are not highlighted in recent work.
